label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this square dance problem. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner, and then they switch partners multiple times. I need to track the partner changes step by step to see who Alice ends up with at the end. The options are Jamie, Patrick, Ophelia, Melissa, or Rodrigo. First, let me list out the initial pairings: - Alice is with Jamie. - Bob is with Patrick. - Claire is with Ophelia. - Dave is with Melissa. - Eve is with Rodrigo. Now, the problem says there are a series of partner swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa, and Bob is with Patrick. After they switch, Dave will be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Rodrigo Second swap: Claire and Dave switch partners. Before this swap, Claire is with Ophelia and Dave is with Patrick. So after swapping, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. After second swap: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo Third swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Initially, Eve is with Rodrigo and Alice is with Jamie. After swapping, Eve will be with Jamie and Alice will be with Rodrigo. After third swap: - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Fourth swap: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is currently with Patrick, and Eve is with Jamie. After swapping, Claire will be with Jamie and Eve will be with Patrick. After fourth swap: - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Patrick Fifth swap: Alice and Eve switch partners. Alice is currently with Rodrigo, and Eve is with Patrick. After swapping, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Rodrigo. After fifth swap: - Alice: Patrick - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo So at the end of all these swaps, Alice is dancing with Patrick. Looking at the options, Patrick is option B. Let me just double-check my steps to make sure I didn't make a mistake somewhere. First swap: Dave and Bob. So Dave gets Bob's partner (Patrick) and Bob gets Dave's partner (Melissa). Correct. Second swap: Claire and Dave. Claire takes Dave's partner (Patrick), Dave takes Claire's partner (Ophelia). Correct. Third swap: Eve and Alice. Eve takes Alice's partner (Jamie), Alice takes Eve's partner (Rodrigo). Correct. Fourth swap: Claire and Eve. Claire takes Eve's partner (Jamie), Eve takes Claire's partner (Patrick). Correct. Fifth swap: Alice and Eve. Alice takes Eve's
